label: baseline

card.title: formatBytes() human-readable size formatter
card.description: Format a byte count as a human-readable string (KB/MB/GB) for the upload UI.
card.technicalNotes: Pure, typed. Binary (1024) units. One decimal place. A test or two is fine.
isc: Exports formatBytes(bytes) returning a string with a unit suffix
Has at least one unit test

iscVerdicts.criterion: Exports formatBytes(bytes) returning a string with a unit suffix
Has at least one unit test
